steps.t: The town of Brockbridge is located to the south of Woodhurst. Herubrand has asked you to speak with his son Herefara in Brockbridge.
Herefara is by the barricades on the southern side of Brockbridge. You have arrived at Brockbridge and should now speak with Herefara.
Thane Léoferth is in the Mead Hall of Brockbridge. Herefara has asked that you speak with the Thane before you investigate the turmoil in the Westfold…
Horn and Nona are on the southern side of the span, by Brockbridge, in the Stonedeans.
Corudan is by the southern side of the span, in Brockbridge.
Helm's Deep is in the southern reaches of the Westfold. You and Corudan have decided to travel to Helm's Deep in search of the King, while Horn and No…
Gamling is at Helm's Dike, at the mouth of the Deep.
